description_long: This house features a long, narrow footprint with a combination of white and brown exterior walls, giving it a modern yet slightly traditional appearance. The structure includes two main volumes at the front, each with pitched gable roofs, and a longer, lower section extending toward the rear. The front facade is detailed with a prominent entryway, a garage, and several windows, while the rear and sides are more utilitarian with fewer openings. The roofline is primarily gabled at the front, transitioning to a flat or low-pitched section along the extended rear. The house sits on a rectangular plot with adjacent paved areas, likely for driveways or walkways, and features steps and raised platforms integrated into the design.
description: A long, narrow house with white and brown walls, gabled roofs at the front, and a modern entryway with a garage. The structure extends rearward with a mix of pitched and flat roof sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, and two gabled roof sections with visible windows and brown-white color contrast.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated rear section, flat roof, and minimal window openings along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with a simpler, more utilitarian facade and the full length of the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brown and white wall sections, steps, and the transition from gabled to flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front entry with steps, a covered porch, and an adjacent garage door; minimal decorative elements.
